calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Nov-08-2016 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Continued To Dec-09-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Van Duzer of Farella Braun & Martel LLP telephone number 707-967-4000 for Plaintiff Swipe Right LLC.
Joseph Breall of Breall & Breall LLP telephone number 415-345-0545 for Defendants Kurt Simon and Katherine Simon.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling.
Defendants Kurt Simon and Katherine Simon's motion for judgment on the pleadings on the first and second causes of action in the first amended complaint is denied as to both causes of action. "[R]epresentations of one's goals or intentions are statements of fact, not opinion, as they assert the fact of a present state of mind." (Service By Medallion, Inc. v. Clorox Co. (1996) 44 Cal.App.4th 1807, 1817 n.1; see also Edmunds v. Valley Circle Estates (1993) 16 Cal.App.4th 1290, 1300.) Plaintiff adequately alleges a cause of action for intentional misrepresentation and concealment based on misrepresentations and concealment by the Simons of their present intentions with regard to the vacant lot at 2921 Vallejo Street so that they would make the property at 2939 Vallejo Street seem to be more desirable. (First Amended Complaint, pars. 22-25.) Defendants' authorities are inapposite. They stand for the proposition that a prediction regarding a future event or the future actions of a third party are not actionable. Order signed in open Court. The motion for summary judgment on calendar for November 18, 2016 is continued to December 9, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 per the agreement of the parties in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
